HomePage.heroSubtitle: Living, cooking and life in rural Provence
HomePage.exploreProvenceDesc: Stone villages, lavender fields, ancient olive groves — the soul of the South of France.
HomePage.franceDesc: France is not just Paris. Beyond the boulevards lies an ancient countryside of hunting traditions, seasonal markets, and a way of life unchanged for centuries. Come discover the real France.
HomePage.newsletterDesc: Join us for stories from the Provençal countryside — hunting seasons, recipes, and the slow rhythm of rural life.

ArticlesPage.title: Articles
ArticlesPage.subtitle: Stories from the countryside — hunting, cooking, and the rhythm of Provençal life.

VideosPage.title: Videos
VideosPage.subtitle: Watch life unfold in the Provençal countryside.

RecipesPage.title: Recipes
RecipesPage.subtitle: Wild game, fire cooking, and the flavours of Provence.

FrancePage.title: France
FrancePage.subtitle: Hunting culture, rural traditions, and the soul of the French countryside.
FrancePage.huntingDesc: Hunting is woven into the fabric of rural French life. Every autumn, the countryside rings with the sound of the hunt — a tradition passed down through generations.

ProvencePage.title: Provence
ProvencePage.subtitle: Villages, vineyards, olive groves, and the perfume of wild herbs.

AboutPage.title: About
AboutPage.subtitle: Welcome to French Countryside Living.
AboutPage.content: This is a place dedicated to documenting real life in rural Provence — the hunts, the harvests, the meals cooked over fire, and the slow rhythms of countryside living.
AboutPage.marcelDesc: Marcel the Frog is our cheerful mascot — a countryside philosopher who appears throughout the site to offer tips, wisdom, and the occasional wry observation about life in the South of France.

ContactPage.title: Contact
ContactPage.subtitle: Get in touch.
ContactPage.successMessage: Thank you! We'll be in touch soon.
